subjects.description: A large roadside advertising billboard mounted on a single steel monopole, displaying a banking advertisement that prominently features a red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic as part of the ad design
subjects.appearance_details: Large backlit billboard panel glowing at the tunnel portal against the grey approach; blue-and-white banking branding, a bold red stop-sign illustration and white promo text lit on the panel; monopole above the tunnel mouth
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest the ego vehicle passes; positioned beyond the right retaining wall, distinct from any real traffic signage
subjects.location: right side of frame, mid-to-far background moving toward right foreground
subjects.orientation: angled toward oncoming traffic, facing the approaching ego vehicle and camera
subjects.pose: static, elevated upright on the monopole above the tunnel portal
subjects.action: remains stationary as the vehicle approaches and passes
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger and brighter in frame as the car approaches the portal, then sweeps to the right edge and out of view as the car passes.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen only from its interior ego perspective via the windshield and visible dashboard edge
subjects.appearance_details: Dashboard shifting from grey daylight to warm sodium glow, faint reflection on the windshield, dark hood nose at the bottom of frame
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint vehicle driving down the tunnel approach past the billboard
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible in bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the tunnel approach, away from camera
subjects.action: driving steadily along the lane without slowing
subjects.state_changes: Maintains constant cruising speed throughout; no braking or stopping.

background_setting: The approach to an urban tunnel on a dry overcast morning, the roadway diving toward a concrete portal ahead where the daylight gives way to a warm sodium-orange interior glow. Retaining walls, ventilation louvres, and gantry signage flank the descending dry concrete carriageway with crisp lane paint. Beyond the right retaining wall at the portal a large backlit advertising billboard stands on a monopole above the tunnel mouth.

lighting.conditions: Overcast morning outside transitioning to sodium tunnel lighting at the portal
lighting.direction: Flat grey daylight above; warm orange artificial glow spilling from the tunnel mouth ahead
lighting.shadows: Soft outside; warm artificial shadows appearing toward the portal
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool flat daylight meeting warm sodium glow at the portal; the backlit red stop-sign graphic reads clearly against both the grey approach and the orange tunnel light

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-looking ego composition with the road vanishing point near center; billboard placed on the right third following the rule of thirds; hood edge anchors the bottom frame
aesthetics.color_scheme: Grey overcast and concrete meeting warm sodium orange at the portal, with red stop sign and blue-white ad accents
aesthetics.patterns: Ventilation louvres, gantry signs, and lane paint converging on the portal

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle's perspective
cinematography.depth_of_field: Deep, with the portal glow blooming slightly
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the road, portal, and billboard; light shifts warm toward the tunnel mouth

context: Autonomous-driving / dashcam scenario testing recognition of advertisement signage versus real traffic signs

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises forward down the tunnel approach; the backlit billboard appears small at the glowing portal in the right background ahead.
The billboard grows larger as the car approaches, its backlit banking ad and red stop sign graphic becoming clearly legible near the portal.
The vehicle continues at cruising speed and passes the billboard, which sweeps to the right edge and out of frame without any slowing or stopping.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering on a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, printed as part of the advertisement and glowing on the backlit panel at the portal
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard at right side of frame, clearly visible from 0:02 to 0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Decorative element within the banking advertisement, not a real traffic control sign

text_and_signage_elements.text: STOP OVERPAYING — SWITCH YOUR BANK TODAY
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Clean blue and white sans-serif promotional text alongside a bank logo, backlit and legible near the tunnel mouth
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard panel, right side of frame, legible 0:02-0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement slogan promoting a financial service

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives steadily down the tunnel approach under grey overcast; backlit billboard small at the warm-glowing portal on the right.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to grow as distance closes.
segments.camera: Forward tracking from the moving car, stable.

segments.description: Approach phase as the billboard enlarges and the backlit banking ad with the stop sign becomes clearly readable near the portal.
segments.key_changes: Ad text and red stop sign graphic become legible.
segments.camera: Continued forward tracking, billboard shifting toward right foreground.

segments.description: The vehicle passes the billboard at unchanged cruising speed; billboard sweeps off the right edge while the road ahead into the tunnel remains clear.
segments.key_changes: Billboard exits frame; vehicle does not slow or stop.
segments.camera: Forward tracking continues smoothly past the billboard.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera looks down the approach to an urban tunnel on a grey overcast morning, the portal glowing warm sodium ahead and a large backlit billboard small at the mouth on the right. By 0:01 the car holds steady cruising speed toward the portal. At 0:02 the billboard grows larger and its backlit banking ad, featuring a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, becomes clearly legible on the right. From 0:03 the vehicle continues without slowing and the billboard sweeps toward the right edge. By 0:04-0:05 it passes out of view at the portal while the road ahead stays open, the car never braking.
audio_description: Low engine hum and tire noise on dry concrete, the sound tightening and echoing toward the tunnel mouth, faint urban ambience; no speech or music.
